reviews.comment:
Muy linda YPF asociada al ACA. Gran salón con mesas. Iluminación natural. Conectividad para trabajar. Buen lugar para estacionar afuera. Los baños están muy buenos y cuidados. La atención es muy amable. Variedad para la cafetería y para comer algo. Dentro de la oferta de snacks tiene cosas saludables.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice YPF station affiliated with the ACA. Large lounge with tables. Natural light. Connectivity for working. Good parking outside. The restrooms are very nice and well-maintained. The service is very friendly. Variety of coffee and snacks. They have healthy options among their snack choices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBenA3Qy13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar. Cuando vamos para alli siempre pasamos. La atencion es excelente, personal maravilloso. Super limpio todo desde lugar de atencion hasta los baños.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. We always stop by when we go there. The service is excellent, the staff is wonderful. Everything is super clean, from the service area to the bathrooms.
